title: Vitals
subtitle: Recorded vital signs and growth measurements
permissionDenied: You do not have permission to view vitals for this patient.
permissionWriteDenied: You do not have permission to record vitals.

errors.outOfRange: Value is outside the expected range.
errors.bloodPressurePartial: Enter both systolic and diastolic, or leave both blank.
errors.diastolicAboveSystolic: Diastolic must be lower than systolic.

growth.title: Growth chart
growth.description: Patient measurements overlaid on WHO reference percentiles.
growth.notApplicable: Growth charts are shown for patients under 19 years old with sex recorded.
growth.noMeasurements: Record height or weight to plot this patient on the growth curve.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this reading?
confirmDelete.description: This will remove the vitals reading. You can re-record it at any time.
